'''tawada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabela|tabela]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabela|tabela]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tawada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæwædæth|tæwædæth]] || [[word:tæwædæj|tæwædæj]] || [[word:tæwædæsh|tæwædæsh]] || [[word:tæwædæ|tæwædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tawawadath|tawawadath]] || [[word:tawawadaj|tawawadaj]] || [[word:tawawadash|tawawadash]] || [[word:tawawada|tawawada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tawadath|tawadath]] || [[word:tawadaj|tawadaj]] || [[word:tawadash|tawadash]] || [[word:tawada|tawada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tawafdath|tawafdath]] || [[word:tawafdaj|tawafdaj]] || [[word:tawafdash|tawafdash]] || [[word:tawafdaf|tawafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tawadatha|tawadatha]] || [[word:tawadaja|tawadaja]] || [[word:tawadasha|tawadasha]] || [[word:tawadaka|tawadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tawadath|tawadath]] || [[word:tawadaj|tawadaj]] || [[word:tawadash|tawadash]] || [[word:tawada|tawada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tawadathal|tawadathal]] || [[word:tawadajal|tawadajal]] || [[word:tawadashal|tawadashal]] || [[word:tawadakal|tawadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tawadathatha|tawadathatha]] || [[word:tawadajaja|tawadajaja]] || [[word:tawadashasha|tawadashasha]] || [[word:tawadaka|tawadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tawadathan|tawadathan]] || [[word:tawadajan|tawadajan]] || [[word:tawadashan|tawadashan]] || [[word:tawadakan|tawadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tawadathaoro|tawadathaoro]] || [[word:tawadajaoro|tawadajaoro]] || [[word:tawadashaoro|tawadashaoro]] || [[word:tawadakaoro|tawadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
